characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion, short blonde hair parted in the middle. She has a symmetrical face with subtle makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Beige blazer over a white v-neck top, with a thin gold necklace.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion, long brown hair tied back in a ponytail. She has expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Brown turtleneck sweater and large silver hoop earrings.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, slightly flustered initially, then amazed and enthusiastic.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Sorry! Main late ho gayi, I lost the bus! [Sorry! I'm late, I lost the bus!]
Character A says: You mean, you missed your bus? [You mean, you missed your bus?]
Character B says: Oh haan, I missed my bus! Bahut crowded with people tha! [Oh yes, I missed my bus! It was very crowded with people!]
Character A says: Sirf 'crowded' kaho, everyone knows it means people. [Just say 'crowded', everyone knows it means people.]
Character B says: Right, I missed the bus! It was crowded. Uff, English bolna kabhi kabhi kitna tricky lagta hai na... [Right, I missed the bus! It was crowded. Uff, speaking English feels so tricky sometimes...]
Character A says: Agar bina darr ke confident English bolni hai, toh roz mere saath Supernova par practice karo. [If you want to speak confident English without fear, practice with me daily on Supernova.]
Character B says: Wait, tum AI ho? Par tum toh bilkul real lagti ho! [Wait, you're an AI? But you seem so real!]
Character A says: Haan, main aapki AI English tutor hoon! Real-world situations ki practice karo aur naturally English bolo. [Yes, I am your AI English tutor! Practice real-world situations and speak English naturally.]
Character B says: Wow, main abhi Supernova download karti hoon! [Wow, I'm downloading Supernova right now!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, common English mistake (lost vs missed bus) typical for Indian learners.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's warm, non-judgmental correction style.
- Positions Supernova as a stress-free, daily practice tool for real-world confidence.
- Ends with a strong emotional payoff of amazement and a clear download intent.
